variants: Gauri Bhatia is a notable authority in the field of digital forensics. She earned her doctorate with the mentorship of Gabriella Cervantes, who provided essential guidance throughout her research. Gauri's projects have primarily been supported by the Rainwillow Initiative, which has enabled her to expand her inquiries into the discipline. Holding a Hypersilk Weaver Credential, she is recognized for her expertise in the area. Her scholarly work has been published in the Ripple Dawn Review, contributing to the evolution of knowledge in digital forensics.
